speaker: Seeker

(2) 5 minute mein ek line ka message kisi trusted dost ko: "Aaj layoff hua, bas sun lena." (3) 7 minute mein kal ke liye do kaam likho: HR docs check aur CV ka sirf heading update.

text: Aaj tumne guilt ke bojh ke saath bhi seedhe aur imaandaar steps liye, aur yahi tumhari mazbooti hai. Layoff ek phase hai, tumhari pehchaan usse bahut badi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag mein zor ki seeti bajna
text: Dimaag mein zor ki seeti baj rahi hai aur chehra bilkul sunn pad gaya. Private company ka termination mail dekhte hi haath ki ungliyan thar-thara rahi hain. Dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha control chala gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens A se exact body-signal mirror karke immediate distress ko contain karna.
text: Jo dimaag mein seeti bajne aur chehre ke sunn padne ka jhatka tum bat rahi ho, wahi iss waqt sabse tez chal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dhadkan bahut fast hai aur paseena ruk nahi raha. Sarkari naukri fail ka darr pehle se tha, ab ye bhi chali gayi toh aur ghabrahat ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se family-social comparison pressure ko mirror karna.
text: Naukri ka loss ek taraf hai, aur sarkari-private wali tulna ka social pressure us par aur bhari pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ungliyan thar-tharati hain toh phone bhi theek se hold nahi hota. Mujhe lag raha sab bolenge na sarkari, na private bachayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se implied fear mirror karna - public judgement ka darr pakadna.
text: Tumhe sirf job ka nahi, logon ke faisle aur tippaniyon ka bhi bahut gehra darr pakad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, especially relatives ko kya bolun yahi soch ke seene mein dhadkan uchhalti hai. Dimag blank ho jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se shock se ab tak ke continuous anxiety window ko reflect karna.
text: Mail ke pal se ab tak tumhara system bina break ke alert mode mein hi chal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, even abhi bhi palms geele hain. Ghabrahat se lag raha koi galat decision na le loon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Grounded single question se core conflict ko tumhare words mein sharpen karna.
text: Is waqt sabse bada bojh kis baat ka hai: financial uncertainty, family judgement, ya apni capability par doubt?

speaker: Seeker
text: Family judgement aur apni capability dono. Sir mein seeti tab tez ho jati jab sochti hoon mujhe seriously nahi lenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se role-competence fracture mirror karke inner pressure ko naam dena.
text: Tumhari anxiety ka center yeh lag raha hai ki result hila toh tumhari khud ki kaabiliyat bhi sawaal ban gayi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exactly. Ab dhadkan thodi slow hui hai, par darr abhi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity 3 par anxiety ke neeche ki thakan aur self-doubt reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum andar se bahut ghabraayi hui ho aur saath mein yeh bhi mehsoos kar rahi ho ki ek jhatke ne tumhara confidence hila diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ungliyon ka kampna kam hua hai, par andar darr baitha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Employment + social comparison reality ko validate karna aur worth separate karna.
text: Sarkari-private comparison ke beech job loss aana kisi ko bhi hila deta hai, tumhara reaction bilkul samajhne layak hai. Iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kam capable ho, outcome aur insaan ki value alag cheezein hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunke thoda settle feel ho raha. Paseena pehle se kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Layoff ko structural context dena taaki personal blame reduce ho.
text: Private companies mein layoffs ka decision often budget cycle aur business targets par hota hai, individual ke worth par nahi. Yeh market ka pattern hai, tumhari kamzori ka proof nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, seeti wali feeling halka hai. Ab soch rahi hoon ghar mein kaise batana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next-step readiness ko simple communication choice ke through activate karna.
text: Ghar mein batate waqt tum pehle kis cheez se start karna chahogi: fact, apni feeling, ya agla step?

speaker: Seeker
text: Agla step se start karna better rahega. Saans ab better hai, mujhe thoda structure chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal ke baad 3 short, practical options dena without overload.
text: Teen quick options: (1) Family ko 2-line update: "Job gayi hai, par plan bana liya hai." (2) 8 minute mein CV ka headline aur last role points refresh. (3) 5 minute mein ek trusted contact ko referral ping.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, 2-line update and CV wala doable hai. Haath ab stable lag rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Selected family update ko step-by-step execute karwana for clarity.
text: Pehle note app kholo. Phir likho: "Aaj termination hua, main kal se CV aur applications start kar rahi hoon." Bas yahi family group ya close member ko bhejo, extra explanation abhi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Message bhej diya. Dhadkan control mein lag rahi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Immediate action ko validate karke confidence reinforce karna.
text: Yeh bahut mature step tha - panic ke beech tumne clear aur composed update diya. Tum situation ko handle kar rahi ho, usse dab nahi rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Ghabrahat ka level kaafi kam hai. Ab CV pe focus kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: CV start friction kam karne ke liye micro-template dena.
text: CV start easy rakho: pehle headline line update, phir last role ki 3 bullet achievements likho, bas. Total 10 minute se zyada nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Great, yeh manageable hai. Paseena bhi almost ruk gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Short-term nervous-system normalisation dena taaki relapse fear kam ho.
text: Acute anxiety wave ke baad jab body settle hoti hai toh clarity wapas aati hai, yeh normal pattern hai. Tumhara abhi ka shift isi pattern ka hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa gaya. Dimaag ki seeti bahut kam ho gayi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se day progression mirror karna, stability consolidate karna.
text: Mail ke initial shock se ab tak tumhara system dheere-dheere calm aur focused mode mein aa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, saans normal ho rahi. Kal ke liye ready feel kar rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next morning launch ke liye 2 tiny checkpoints देना.
text: Kal subah mini-checkpoints: (1) 9 baje tak CV file open karna. (2) 9:20 tak ek application draft bhejna, perfect banane ki zarurat nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Perfect, yeh concise hai. Haath ab steady hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Capability evidence highlight karke confidence ko anchor karna.
text: Aaj tumne fear ke beech clear communication, planning aur action teenon kiye - yeh strong capability ka evidence hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, ab ghabrahat low hai. Main aaj rest leke kal kaam start karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se self-image shift mirror karna: panic se planner mode tak.
text: Ab tum apne aap ko helpless nahi, planned response dene wali person ki tarah hold kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, dil ab normal pace pe lag raha. Aaj ke liye itna kaafi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Conversation close pe calm + worth separation reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tumne anxiety wave ko sambhalte hue direction wapas li, aur yeh chhoti baat nahi. Job ka phase badla hai, tumhari keemat nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Peeth mein ajeeb sa bhari-pan chadh gaya hai aur pairon tale zameen hi nikal gayi lag rahi. Layoff sunte hi aawaz baith gayi, bolna tak mushkil hai. Kirana shop wale sasural ki umeed yaad aati hai toh poora jism dheela pad jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens A se exact body symptom mirror karke immediate heaviness ko hold karna.
text: Jo peeth ka ajeeb bhari-pan aur awaaz ka baithna tum keh rahi ho, wahi abhi sabse zyada chadh kar mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, peeth ka bhari-pan utar hi nahi raha. Dimaag mein itni thakan hai ki bed se uthne ka mann nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se sasural expectations ka relational weight mirror karna.
text: Naukri ka loss alag dard de raha hai, aur sasural ki badi umeed ka bojh uss dard ko aur gahra kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, lagta hai physical system collapse ho raha. Koi kaam shuru karne se pehle hi thak jaati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared consequence mirror karna - nakami ki permanent stamp ka darr.
text: Andar se yeh bhi darr chal raha hai ki yeh setback tum par nakami ka label chipka dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exactly wahi. Aawaz baith jaati hai jab koi poochta job ka kya hua. Bas chup ho jaati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity 3 par exhaustion aur self-judgement ka blend reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut hi nichod di gayi mehsoos kar rahi ho, jaise sharir aur mann dono ek saath haar maan rahe hon.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, peeth jam si jati hai aur main bas blank ho jaati. Apne aap pe bharosa kam ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Family-business expectation reality ko normalise karke worth separate karna.
text: Jab sasural ki umeed aur job dono ka pressure ek saath ho, aisi thakan aur body shutdown jaisa feel hona bahut normal hai. Isse tumhari keemat kam nahi hoti, sirf situation ka load bahut zyada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunke halka lag raha, par thakan chhayi hui hai. Main bas rest karna chahti aur guilt bhi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Layoff ko structural reframe dekar personal failure framing reduce karna.
text: Layoff decisions aksar business cost aur market slowdown se hote hain, individual ki mehnat se directly nahi. Yeh system-level jhatka hai, tumhari personal nakaami ka final verdict nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Aawaz abhi dheere aa rahi, par mujhe koi simple aage ka raasta chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke liye ek clear preference question se action-entry prepare karna.
text: Aaj ke liye tum pehle kis pe focus karna chahogi - body ko halka karna, ya kal ke do kaam set karna?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle body halka karna better rahega. Peeth ka bhari-pan thoda kam hua hai. Phir kal ke do kaam set kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 duty-compatible micro options dena without extra load.
text: Teen easy options: (1) 4 minute garam paani ke dheere ghoont. (2) 5 minute peeth ke liye wall support ke saath seedha baithna. (3) 6 minute mein kal ke sirf do kaam likhna: CV open aur ek referral ping.

speaker: Seeker
text: Garam paani aur wall support dono kar sakti hoon. Jism halka lagta hai usse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen body-regulation step ko clear sequence mein karwana.
text: Pehle ek cup garam paani lo aur 5 chhote ghoont lo. Phir deewar se peeth lagakar 90 second seedha baitho, kandhe dhile chhodo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kiya maine. Peeth ka bojh halka lag raha aur aawaz bhi thodi khul rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro-success validate karke agency ko reinforce karna.
text: Bahut achha step tha - body itni heavy hone ke baad bhi tumne apne aap ko regulate kiya. Yeh control wapas aane ka clear sign hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thakan ab manageable lag rahi. Kal ke do kaam likh leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Low-friction planning template dena for next-day momentum.
text: Likho: Task 1 - CV file open karke headline update (8 min). Task 2 - ek known contact ko short message (5 min). Bas do hi tasks, aur kuch nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, do tasks likh liye. Dimaag ka bojh kam lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exhaustion-wave normalization dena taaki relapse par self-blame kam ho.
text: Layoff ke baad jo body heaviness aur voice low hona aata hai, woh short-term stress response hota hai. Chhote structured steps is response ko dheere-dheere settle kar dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa gaya. Aawaz bhi stable lag rahi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se subah se ab tak ki improvement mirror karna.
text: Subah ke collapse jaisa feel se ab tum steady voice aur clear tasks tak aa gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, peeth ka feel manageable hai. Aaj raat thoda rest le paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Effort ko validate karna aur shame/nakami framing ko soften karna.
text: Aaj tumne nakami ke weight ke beech practical steps liye, yeh bahut meaningful progress hai. Tum toot nahi rahi, tum adapt kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks, pair bhi ab stable lag rahe. Kal start karne ka dar kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Morning start ko frictionless banane ke liye tiny trigger देना.
text: Kal ka trigger note kar lo: "8 minute CV, bas start." Alarm ke saath yeh line set karo, perfect karne ka pressure nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Noted, yeh line kaam karegi. Jism halka lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se self-view shift mirror karna: collapse se control mode tak.
text: Ab tum apne aap ko haari hui nahi, step-by-step handle karne wali position mein rakh rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thakan low ho gayi compared to subah. Mind bhi clearer hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Day-end emotional closure dena aur worth separate karna.
text: Aaj tumne body heaviness, guilt aur planning teenon ko sambhala - yeh real resilience hai. Job ka setback tumhari poori pehchaan define nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Aawaz normal lag rahi ab. Mujhe confidence aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sleep-before closure ke liye do ultra-short tasks देना.
text: Sone se pehle sirf do kaam: (1) Kal ka alarm + trigger line set. (2) Paani ka glass bed ke paas rakh do. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, dono kar diya. Peeth relaxed lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se full-day shift mirror karke calm closure देना.
text: Subah ke collapse feel se raat tak tumne pace ko steady aur body ko calmer state mein la diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, ab system stable lag raha. Aaj ke liye kaafi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reassurance देकर recovery trajectory par trust reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tumne exhaustion ke beech bhi apne aap ko sambhal kar direction li, aur yeh bahut badi baat hai. Yeh phase guzrega, tumhari keemat aur himmat dono barkarar hain.
